Who I Am

Where Technology Meets Creativity

I'm Jacqueline — an Artificial Intelligence student at UTeM with a natural curiosity for how technology can shape the world. Beyond the classroom, I channel that same creativity into running my own floral workshop, assisting brides in finding their perfect gown, and building meaningful customer relationships in luxury retail. I thrive when I can combine logic with heart.

🤖 Artificial Intelligence 💐 Floral Design 👰 Bridal Styling ✨ Luxury Retail 🎓 UTeM Student 📚 Librarian President

About Me

Jacqueline
Ng Jia Chyi

Hi! I'm a 22-year-old Bachelor of Artificial Intelligence student at UTeM. I'm genuinely fascinated by how AI and technology reshape the world around us — and I bring that same enthusiasm and curiosity to everything else I pursue.

Outside of studies, I run my own online florist workshop, support brides at a wedding boutique, and have gained hands-on experience in luxury retail. I believe that showing up fully — with creativity, warmth, and dedication — makes all the difference.

Based in Johor, Malaysia

Bachelor of Artificial Intelligence

Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Artificial Intelligence at UTeM (Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka). My studies cover machine learning, programming, database systems, data science, and real-world AI applications. I'm passionate about understanding how intelligent systems work and how they can be applied to solve meaningful problems.

Completed STPM at SMK Dato' Sri Amar Diraja, taking subjects in Economy, Pengajian Am, Geography, Commerce, and MUET (Malaysian University English Test).
